name: Sunway Express
recent_news: Yellow Pages lists Sunway Express at 16503 Littleriver Ln, Cerritos as CLOSED. No active web/business presence indicating ongoing school transportation operations.
fit_notes: Not a viable Summit tuck-in target. Listed as closed; micro-operator (2 employees) with no confirmed school district contracts. Distinct from unrelated Sunway Charters (Carolinas) and Megabus partner.

name: Too Hip Limousine
recent_news: No notable news. Registered as Too Hip Limousine Inc at 1116 8th St, Manhattan Beach. Appears to be a micro livery/limo operator, not a school-bus contractor.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in fit. Limousine service, not school/special-needs transportation; 2 employees and no fleet scale. Special-needs flag in source data appears mis-tagged.

name: Sids Transportation Svc
recent_news: No web presence found. Registered at a residential address in Katy, TX (23918 River Place Dr). Katy ISD operates its own 271-bus special-needs fleet in-house, reducing likelihood of district contract.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in candidate. Sole-proprietor micro-operator with no demonstrable district business; local school district self-performs special-needs transport.

name: AAA Discount Limo
recent_news: No direct web hits in Monterey limo market alongside Apex, AITS, Arrow, Elite, etc. No school transportation footprint identified.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in target. Monterey-area limo/airport service, not school-bus contractor. Special-needs flag in source data appears mis-tagged.

name: Grabill-Lifford Limos
recent_news: No business website or recent news found. Rural Newaygo, MI residential-address listing; the Michael Grabill identified locally is associated with Mike Grabill Construction, not a transportation enterprise.
fit_notes: Not a Summit tuck-in candidate. Micro limo/livery operator with no school-bus operations or district relationships identified.
